enrichment.summary: Kyle records a casual Saturday vlog while high, describing his inverted sleep schedule (going to bed at sunrise), working on Google Earth mapping projects and YouTube videos, and dealing with a broken heater that forced him to shower at a nearby club.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: prefers going to bed at sunrise and has always been that way; embraces it rather than fighting it
finds it genuinely fascinating, even while high

entities: Bay of Declaration (likely 'Baie de la Déclaration')

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I'm pretty high right now.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I just had a shower.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Yesterday I was working until like six and I was trying to get light and stuff so I got to sleep.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I love going to bed at sunrise.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I never have trouble getting to sleep late.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I have the worst time getting to sleep.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Even if I've only had a normal day and I'm not totally tired, I can still get to sleep right at sunrise.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I always been like that, but now I just organized it in a dream here in the right way so that I have to look at the camera.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I got up at like noon, which is only six hours asleep.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I thought they were gonna come and do something, but I'm all right now.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Somebody called me and said that the electric company needed to put a new sensor in behind my heater.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: They said they would come one day, but I just got up anyway.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I was working on those videos, those times for all videos, and now I'm adding the audio track to it too.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: They're complete, and I'm gonna upload them on YouTube.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: There are like a hundred of them, but I'm not getting carried away with it.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I mainly work on Google Earth.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I'm coming through Google Earth, and if I work all day and night here now, it'll be coming up.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I'm gonna do the bad as a declaration but differently because not all of it is actually in the map.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: That lake I had to build myself because only two-thirds of it was in the map.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: The bads of the declaration only like 10% of it is in the map.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: The Wikipedia article didn't have a picture of the lake, so I had to build it myself.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I couldn't superimpose it, but through this as a declaration, you can superimpose it really well right on it.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I'll get to build my own and then make it 3D and build my own cities on it.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I'm listening to the history of England right now, and it's really fascinating.

claims.subject: England
claims.claim: England has such a fascinating history.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Even being high, it's still fascinating to listen to.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: My heater burrow can take, but there's no hot water comes out, so I had to go to the club in the house to take a shower.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Hopefully, they'll fix it.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I didn't have a shower last night either, and the night before last, so I was smelling myself.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I went over there to take a shower.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I didn't have the kick code to get in there last night, otherwise I would have.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I'm gonna split up shut.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I'm gonna get back to my project now.
